query:
SELECT DISTINCT LEFT(address, 10) as prefixo, COUNT(*) as qty
FROM establishments 
WHERE status = 'pending' 
  AND address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' 
  AND address NOT REGEXP '^(Rua|Avenida|Alameda|Praça|Travessa|Largo|Estrada|Rodovia|Viela|Beco|Viaduto|Passagem|Vila|Ladeira|Parque|Ponte|Marginal|Acesso) '
GROUP BY LEFT(address, 10)
ORDER BY qty DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute

FROM establishments 
WHERE status = 'pending' 
  AND address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' 
  AND address NOT REGEXP '^(Rua|Avenida|Alameda|Praça|Travessa|Largo|Estrada|Rodovia|Viela|Beco|Viaduto|Passagem|Vila|Ladeira|Parque|Ponte|Marginal|Acesso) '
GROUP BY LEFT(address, 10)
ORDER BY qty DESC
LIMIT 20;
